rationale: Section 31.07 governs acceptance of partial and separate property tax payments and allocation among taxing units. It does not reference the homestead exemption amount in §11.13(b), so increasing the exemption does not conflict with these payment procedures.
quote: A person may pay the tax imposed on any one property without simultaneously paying taxes imposed on other property he owns.
_note: No conflict. §31.07 addresses payment acceptance mechanics, not exemption amounts.
